name: Ollama + Claude Code Studio + Docker
description: A Dockerfile-based template with all Claude Code features (backend, hooks, privacy, rules, skills), Docker-in-Docker, Node.js, and GitHub CLI for local LLM development. Persists authentication and settings across rebuilds via a named volume.

imageVariant.description: Ubuntu version (use ubuntu-22.04 or ubuntu-18.04 on local arm64/Apple Silicon):
